statement: In every magma, Equation 3250 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * u) * w`) implies Equation 2371 (`x = (y * (z * (x * y))) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0742
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) u) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op x y))) w)
